textByHashes.b8373ac50a6103eac4876e5cb17f12f9c824a3e6: I didn't think ye were serious about that!
textByHashes.09e42b110cd8077833bf629ceb4aa96d253e16d4: Oh yeah of course, I know it by heart. Hah!
textByHashes.9436f20a2f240d3193cf46180ce8b99d85c903c0: When the foeman bares his.. peels?
textByHashes.f3c7510dfbc11f9a9118b6a197e429faa1b9902d: I don't know this! I do not know this one!
textByHashes.f39f63b1c9326e5514e62e1e27d1d7232f56bf11: I don't even know what a foeman is!
textByHashes.a84689bb3f9d7daa976404dd120e51ad48b45849: Well met stranger, how do you come to be in this place?
textByHashes.a3ca38aa4f9540665b17c8cab47bf3f9f23ce91d: Is that so? Well that makes you my friend too. Me and Rinder here helped that crazy priest track him down.
textByHashes.d6db78e946835206bdf90c25403c8e41f8da2bb2: I won't lie, it was no selfless act. We've been promised grand rewards.
textByHashes.a0358a7f9ad0add455ffbf3486ed4324da7c3ab1: And why would you think a man like me would have any raisins?
textByHashes.0ea281660bc1c88ce77c6553c41e97db108615f9: Well I'll be! Kid, raisins are dried-up grapes.
textByHashes.f5be5a7c6cdb60851eae2620a7bc461bde47cd4a: As it happens I have a sackful of grapes in my possession.
textByHashes.6e2d9cdf326c24d3ec4ae94ada341a45a956f080: There are great and terrible beasts in this world kid. We'd been hunting them, and believe me when I tell ye, some of 'em had an awful lot of grapes on their person.
textByHashes.86347c4c34de83287d08fef5592e5556c8ed70b6: The slaughter was feverish. We'd cut 'em down and they'd rise up, again and again.
textByHashes.8e07bf72acc084a6158f75c89f12684a93607fc7: Before we knew it, we'd collected a whole sackful o' grapes!
textByHashes.d8457d2e44ce034d351d4cd6ab286fa963fdbfb0: Seems to me we could make those into raisins, should that align with your intentions.
textByHashes.21d63511dfd957d1959ee7474678bcb15724e8fd: Well alright, it'll be a long journey though.
textByHashes.9a0ae26f2a6c8dff8328cb6ee5b4199f8290949f: Our friend here needs some raisins, let's head to the desert!
textByHashes.fb0411cb01fa964a5302f44d6e2d97559e268a2a: This big rock is perfect fer makin' raisins, kid. It's real warm.
textByHashes.cfa9820c718d72d0c8767244e1045158230386d8: We'll leave the grapes here in good clean heat, give 'em time to think about their transgressions.
textByHashes.979c6f40e9d30710cb84de7535758332ab573a77: Alright alright already! Let's get these grapes going.
textByHashes.9b6d49343505f20d0a84fa14dec76e36b22a5671: We'll see them desiccated soon enough.
textByHashes.46f039d3049e0f3435c803e1315d11010c780e49: , You've gotta make the grapes feel bad or they won't shrivel up.
textByHashes.7b4119457fb0eacb0657776ec2d2bedd755391d1: Yes it was, come back when ye have some space and I'll give ye yer share of raisins.
textByHashes.f001275ce2684af6b432829836d055b35f0206bb: Yes it was. Here's some raisins for yer troubles.
textByHashes.aac4af66d2b12a4684f662a78238bfc5fa6558b5: I think ye have enough raisins at the moment.
textByHashes.66dab3bbe6845c19dcae0c999ade405f70ef8816: Make some space for them and ye can have some more.
textByHashes.09310bd48f6781c40fbafaed30d8f1f3629336d4: Of course, we've plenty to spare after that trip.
textByHashes.6dd364ece92a89f2787c16449a6ac8d9449d71b3: I was plenty happy to educate ye.
textByHashes.f2633afe445533c3b24f732df1473f2865eac064: Any time. You owe me one.
textByHashes.ce57aee7f346800c40db96e674cb07cc7e425a00: Ah don't be like that Rinder, how will we know till we try?
textByHashes.a1198e70872c2b80e25339b1e543728035cdbfab: I've had this great idea see.
textByHashes.07e870f3c31126013d304a85e0dd68d503f156c3: Well y'see thats the beauty of it.
textByHashes.4650b20102c462aa10b5b40ad6c23448cca81ed9: It's a lot easier to melt chocolate than dry out grapes.
textByHashes.0f0f0a3290676a3c2450a4daed9cfdff86e8a04c: Exactly! See Rinder, doesn't even know half the idea yet and wants in!
textByHashes.aaf8b520fc220341ba0065e0cc450bdab21ad0c0: Okay so, what we do is use our connections with the Easter Bunny to acquire a lot of chocolate.
textByHashes.beced809f0d0ed305dbeb02c460a5b6116aa9fe7: And we melt it all up, and put it in a fountain.
textByHashes.d474b109e3b9321b3f410750eaac704719d5b6a2: No then we sell people the right to take a couple of small fruits to dip in the fountain and eat!
textByHashes.68e0ce1532943021b4c577c6f7dfb209ac2b422f: See the amount people would pay for just a taste of chocolate is so much higher than we'd have to pay to source a lot of the stuff.
